title: YTP: Billy Mays Raves With the Best Product He Has Ever Pulled Out of the Infinite Void in His Ass
description:
Another long-named Billy Mays poop for your pooping pleasure, now with 100% more rage quitting.

EDIT: 10 minutes after uploading, I realized the ending should have had Billy Mays saying "At least I have chicken" instead of "At least I wear burnt on cheese" for a small Leeroy Jenkins reference.  Maybe next time xP
